titleStmt.title: SII 38.379: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 379. (A.R. No. 379 of 1912.) DĒVIKĀPURAM, ARNI TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south wall, second prākāra, Bṛihadāmba temple.

summary.p: Records the shepherds (maṇrāḍis) namely Saṅkarakkōṉ, Periyavīran and others of (Dēvikkāpuram) in Murugamaṅgalappaṟṟu in Mēlkuṉṟa-nāḍu in Palkuṉṟa-kkōṭṭam (a sub-division) of Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam, agreed to measure out one kuruṇi of ghee, in lieu of [the tax] Sādakkaḍamal, at the temple treasury every year. Probably they supplied ghee (for the ritual services) instituted by Tirumalaināthar Piḷḷai.
The temple accountant Uttaṇḍar figures as the signatory of this record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhastiśrīmaṉmakāmaṇṭalecura metiṉi micura kaṇṭa
kaṭṭāri cāḷuva Ariya Irāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuvarāyar
kaṇṭa muvarāyar kaṇṭaṉ Accutaiyateva makārāyar
piṟutivirācciyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa cakāṟtam 100 4 10 57
mel cellāniṉṟa ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
palkuṉṟakoṭṭattu melkuṉṟanāṭṭu murukamaṅkalappaṟṟu
kalapura(m)mil Irukku maṉṟāṭikaḷil caṅkarakkoṉ periya
viraṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār cātakkaṭamaikku tevakkāpuram tirumalar Uṭaiya nayiṉār
kku mutale ra kārapiḷavaḷi
tirumalainātar piḷḷaiviṭṭa varuṣamThis symbol indicates varuṣam 1 kku Aḷakku neyi 3 Inta neyi kuṟu
ṇiyum varuṣam varuṣam toṟum tirukkoyilpaṇṭārattile Aḷakka
kaṭaivar Ākavum yintataṉmattukku yiyātoruvar Akutam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ
keṅkaik karaiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭaivarkaḷ
(kaḷ) Ākavum Ippaṭikku Eḻutiṉamaikku koyilkaṇakku Uttaṇṭar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 38.379 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
